stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
You right. I was wrong. Said GTX 1050 supported by current driver — true. But didn't verify open vs proprietary split. `nvidia-open-dkms` requires Turing+. GTX 1050 needs `nvidia-dkms` (proprietary). Should have caught that distinction before recommending.

Run the swap:

```bash
sudo pacman -R nvidia-open-dkms --noconfirm && \
sudo pacman -S nvidia-dkms --noconfirm && \
sudo modprobe nvidia && \
nvidia-smi
```
